text.title: Launch RACI Template Worked Example
text.summary: One end-to-end worked example demonstrating a clean application of Launch RACI Template, anchored to the schema in content/02-output-contract.xml.

example.title: Launch RACI Template — clean application
example.note: orion-1.0 launch — 9 workstreams across pre/day/post; lead Iryna V.; rehearsal 2026-05-20 completed; raci-2026-orion-launch frozen at T-1.
